query: Can you help me design a week-long travel itinerary for a group of 5, departing from Washington and visiting 3 different cities in Indiana? The trip should last from March 23rd to March 29th, 2022, and our budget is set at $23,800. It's important to note that our accommodations need to be suitable for children under 10 years of age.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Washington to Evansville, duration: 10 hours 59 mins, distance: 1,168 km, cost: 58
plan.attraction: Mesker Park Zoo; Children's Museum of Evansville;
plan.accommodation: Authentic artist loft space in Prime Williamsburg, Evansville

plan.attraction: Wesselman Woods; Angel Mounds State Historic Site;
plan.accommodation: Authentic artist loft space in Prime Williamsburg, Evansville

plan.attraction: Potawatomi Zoo; South Bend Museum of Art;
